Angular v17 #10

entry.content:
Lissy93 merged Lissy93/dashy#2113 · May 3, 2026 02:14
Small fixes and implementing user requests #2113

    • Fixes #2102
  • Adds suitable SVG --> PNG fallback for homelab icons

What is FastDDL?

FastDDL is a temporary encrypted file sharing service with a unique transparency angle.

Key features:
